notes: AI Doctor fixture cases. Every expected_output includes all 8 required fields. No hardware diagnosis. No device control. No auto-execute language.

cases.description: Thin context — only one observation, no recent snapshot.

evidence: One observation entry on 2026-04-04 noting healthy growth (demo)
missing_info: No watering or feeding entry in last 48 h
expected_output.immediate_action: Take a top-down photo and log a manual sensor snapshot before next action.
do_not_do: Do not change feeding strength based on a single observation
expected_output.check_24h: Re-check after adding a photo and snapshot; look for color change or droop.
expected_output.plan_3day: Day 1: add photo + snapshot. Day 2: log watering with pH. Day 3: review trend before any change.

cases.description: Overnight RH spike above target — demo case from demo-grow-one-tent.

evidence: Stage is vegetation; elevated overnight RH increases mold risk (demo)
missing_info: No fresh temperature snapshot to compute VPD precisely
No air-movement context logged in diary
expected_output.immediate_action: Observe canopy for moisture in the morning; log a manual RH snapshot after lights-on.
do_not_do: Do not heavy-defoliate to fix RH
expected_output.check_24h: Compare tonight's overnight RH curve with last night.
expected_output.plan_3day: Day 1: log morning + evening snapshots. Day 2: note any leaf moisture or smell. Day 3: review trend before adjusting strategy.

evidence: Most recent temperature reading is marked stale (>15 min old)
missing_info: Fresh temperature reading is needed before any environment decision
Sensor source health needs grower review
expected_output.immediate_action: Log a manual temperature snapshot now to re-establish current state.
do_not_do: Do not change environment based on stale data
Do not approve any environment-changing action until a fresh snapshot exists
expected_output.check_24h: Confirm sensor source is producing fresh readings; if not, continue with manual snapshots.
expected_output.plan_3day: Day 1: re-establish fresh telemetry. Day 2: confirm trend. Day 3: review whether sensor source needs grower-side attention.

evidence: Most recent humidity reading is marked invalid (out of physical range)
missing_info: A valid humidity reading is required
Cross-check with a second source or a manual reading
expected_output.immediate_action: Log a manual humidity snapshot to establish a trustworthy value.
do_not_do: Do not classify the tent as healthy based on invalid telemetry
Do not change environment strategy from one invalid reading
expected_output.check_24h: Confirm whether invalid readings persist or were a one-off.
expected_output.plan_3day: Day 1: manual snapshots only. Day 2: confirm pattern. Day 3: grower-side review of sensor source.

cases.description: Photo provided but no diary or snapshot context.

missing_info: No defined stage targets for current context
expected_output.immediate_action: Add a manual sensor snapshot and a short observation note.
do_not_do: Do not diagnose a deficiency from a single photo
expected_output.plan_3day: Day 1: snapshot + note. Day 2: photo from same angle. Day 3: compare and decide whether more context is needed.
